# Edge Cases Checklist: Optimize and refine workspace package management

**Purpose**: Validate edge case coverage and exception flows in requirements
**Created**: 2026-03-16
**Feature**: [specs/028-refine-package-management/spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK001 Are version conflict resolution rules specified for dependencies with required mismatched versions? [Edge Case, Spec §边界情况-版本不一致]
- [x] CHK002 Are local package linking edge cases defined (dev of packages/cli vs published version)? [Edge Case, Spec §边界情况-本地包链接]
- [x] CHK003 Are Python legacy integration edge cases defined (optional install, failure isolation)? [Edge Case, Spec §边界情况-Python 遗留项]
- [x] CHK004 Are partial-failure scenarios defined (one workspace install fails) and expected outcomes specified? [Coverage, Gap]
